creator: jonathan.leffler@gmail.com
text:
I agree that more recent versions of macOS (Monterey 12.6.1 tested) have the bug fixed with "grep (BSD grep, GNU compatible) 2.6.0-FreeBSD".  So, indeed, there is little point in reporting it to Apple — and there was little point in reporting it here either.

I apologize for the trouble.  Thank you for investigating.

I agree that the bug should be closed as "already fixed" — or "unable to reproduce" in current versions — and that has already happened.
